text: My diet starts Monday. Just like it has every Monday since 2003.
Netflix asked if I was still watching. Even Netflix is judging me now.
The weather is nice outside today.
My cat has a better social life than me. He gets invited to all the neighborhood fights.
I went to the gym once. They asked me to leave because I was just sitting in the parking lot.
Autocorrect changed 'I'm on my way' to 'I'm on my waffle' and honestly that's more accurate.
I like to exercise in the morning. Just kidding, I hit snooze seven times.
Ate a salad for lunch today.
My bank account and I have something in common: we both have no interest.
